notes: Moved Spending Plan out of the Pathmark Online beta workspace tabs.
Added Spending Plan beta as its own top-level beta tab alongside Pathmark Online beta.
Kept Spending Plan records in the user-owned Pathmark Sync sheet using the existing spending_income, spending_expenses, and spending_accounts tabs.
Kept Pathmark Online beta focused on goals, routines, weekly focus, review, tasklists, calendar export, Google Tasks export, archive, and settings.
Local desktop package is carried forward unchanged apart from release packaging.
release: v0.6.10 separate Spending Plan beta tab
release_notes: Moves Spending Plan out of the Pathmark Online beta workspace and into its own top-level Spending Plan beta tab alongside Pathmark Online beta. Spending Plan records remain saved in the user-owned Pathmark Sync sheet.
